channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: House Republican from Florida announces he won't seek re-election this year
item.description: Republican Rep. Daniel Webster of Florida, who has served in the House since 2011, announces he will not run for re-election this year.

item.title: Trump-appointed federal judge tosses DOJ lawsuit seeking Arizona voter data
item.description: A Trump-appointed federal judge in Arizona dismissed a Justice Department lawsuit seeking access to the state's voter rolls on Tuesday.

item.title: Succession to Fla. Rep. Webster to Be '3 Ring Circus'
item.description: "No one has any idea who will succeed Dan Webster in [Florida's] 11th District, but you can be sure the Republican primary will be a three-ring circus...

item.title: Warmth of Collectivism Mamdani Declares ‘Historic’ Crisis After Blowing Deadline, Pushes State Bailout
